none.description: You may not use the material in any way without explicit permission from the creator.

privateUse.description: You may use the material for private purposes.

commercialUse.description: You may use the material for commercial purposes.

distribution.description: You may share and distribute the material in unmodified form.

adaptation.description: You may modify, transform, and build upon the material, and distribute the modified contributions.

none.description: There are no conditions for using the material (though attribution is appreciated!).

attribution.description: You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.

stateChanges.description: You must document all changes made to the published material.

nonCommercial.description: You may not use the material for commercial purposes.

noRestrictions.description: You may not apply legal terms or technological measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

shareAlike.description: If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.

noDerivatives.description: If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you may not distribute the modified material.

noDistribution.description: You may not share, distribute, or publicly display the material.

custom.description: This license includes unique, custom conditions. You must read the official license text for specific restrictions.

noWarranty.description: The material is provided 'as is'. The licensor provides no guarantees regarding its quality, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.

liability.description: The licensor cannot be held legally or financially responsible for any damages, data loss, or losses arising from your use of the material.

trademarkUse.description: The license does not grant you any rights in the licensor's brand names, logos, or trademarks.
